occupation: Revenue Head - UK & Europe at Times OOH
headline: TIMES OOH•1K followers
summary:
A natural leader and problem solver, with a successful track record in customer acquisition, account management & client retention. Experienced in the areas of selling, planning, buying & management. A strong communicator, who believes in delivering harmonious solutions for all parties.

Possessing an energetic, positive style of doing business, and will always look to interact with others who want to generate a positive outcome. I look to bring all the pieces of a puzzle together, not only because of my desire to delivering the right solution, but because I want to engage with all key stakeholders in any given project.

What it is extremely important for me is to work with either companies or individuals with a strongly defined culture, have the opportunity to be a difference maker in the business, and to be inspired by the people who work there

experiences.title: Revenue Head - UK & Europe
experiences.description:
Currently working with Times of India as their sales & revenue officer, with responsibility for
analysing & developing new OOH business opportunities, across Europe for both Mumbai & Delhi International Airports.

Concentrating on 3 key elements - sales revenues, commercial agreements & client management, - I have been responsible for a number of positive outcomes for the Times of India business since 2016.

Created a strategic, contextual overview for both Mumbai & Delhi Airport’s offering for the UK & European OOH market, which contributed to sales revenues of over 15m USD being generated from the UK since 2016.
Succeeding in trebling brand count originating from the UK within these Airports, which ensured double digit growth in sales revenues every year between 2016 - 2020
Responsible for managing biggest single client booking at Delhi Airport, generating an additional 30% net revenue from 2020 into 2021.
Negotiated a series of commercial arrangements between key internal & external stakeholders that enabled UK based client budgets to be allocated within the Indian Airport space.

experiences.title: International Investment Director
experiences.description:
Joined Aviator on a fixed term contract , with the initial remit of creating a better understanding of revenue streams & client billings for senior management within this highly specialised business.

Concentrating on 3 key elements - commercial, process & management - I was responsible for a number of positive outcomes to the Aviator business over a 2 year period.

Client billings increased 15% over a 2 year period.
Business revenues increased 21% over same period.
Negotiated unique investment partnerships, at client & agency level, for the likes of Marriott, Accenture & Chanel Uk.
Successfully set & achieved all re- forecasted targets across EMEA region for 6 successive quarters.
Managed global pricing grids for key Aviation clients across EMEA region.
Created pipeline system to ensure accurate forecasting, the ability to identify opportunities/ areas of concern, and as a means of measuring performance.
Responsibility for hiring 50% of current Aviator team, 50% of whom were promoted within their first 12 months.

experiences.title: Independent Business Owner
experiences.description:
Ambrose Solutions is an OOH media Consultancy that has provided Commercial, Digital & Marketing expertise for several OOH businesses since its inception in 2015.  

You can reach me at Matt.Stubbings@Ambrosesolutions.co.uk if you require help with any OOH projects, either on a fixed term period or if you require a certain number of hours pw on a more permanent basis.

Projects include:

Worked with Clear Channel as sales agent, analysing & developing new OOH business opportunities, across Europe for International Airports in Italy, Switzerland, Norway & Finland.
Consulted for UK market leading transport media owner in a sales & development capacity, looking at additional revenue streams across classic & digital inventory.
Created comprehensive overview of digital OOH industry, with a view to helping businesses gain a better understanding of how they can maximize this opportunity with their existing portfolio
Created commercial partnerships & advised on sales strategy for a start-up UK digital OOH opportunity.
Developed price structure, adapted existing marketing material & communicated proposition of bespoke European Digital Ad Network to key agency personnel.
Awarded a Certificate in Digital Marketing for the successful completion of Google’s ‘Squared 
Online’ course August 2016

experiences.title: Head Of Business Development
experiences.description:
Bubble Outdoor started as Signkick Media in 2012,  with a clear goal to simplify and speed up the planning and buying of Out of Home media. Rebranded in 2018, it offered over 80,000 OOH separate locations, both digital & classic, across multiple environments & formats, for advertisers to choose from and buy.

My role within Bubble was to advise potential clients, whether they be small businesses, creative agencies or in-house marketing departments, on the opportunities that exist within the OOH market that were either not on the platform, or required a more detailed planning/buying focus across multiple locations.

Working with clients such as Ecco Shoes, Rizla & Purple Bricks, from 2017- 2020, I managed 60% of all Bubble's revenue during this 4 year period. The pandemic saw a 50% drop in all Bubble revenue, but my offline investment accounted for 75% of all business during this tough period.

I also worked closely with the major UK OOH media owners, looking to create bespoke online packages for clients & advertisers to purchase directly from the Bubble platform. My newly created online Rail digital packages were responsible for 15% of Bubble online revenue in 2019.

experiences.title: Investment Director/Head of Trading/Backlights Group Head
experiences.description:
Initially managing a team across Primesight’s premium national backlight large format portfolio, increasing billings from just over £1m to £5m over a 2 year period. 

Promoted to Head of Trading in July 2005, managing 4 direct reports & 16 people in total across both the trading & inventory teams, with responsibility for trading across the entire Primesight OOH portfolio.

Managed huge amount of growth in traded revenue over a 7 year period, from initial billings of £25m to delivering a budgeted number of £55m in 2012.

Developed strong relationships with key internal stakeholders, as well as across senior trading & investment personnel at client, agency & poster specialists.

Implemented monthly, quarterly & annual external reviews of Primesight performance to all poster specialists, provided insight on strong/poor performance, and communicated relevant trends across the market.

Promoted to Investment Director in September 2012, with remit to supervise annual sales targets, both individual & team. Created regular incentives, monetary or otherwise, to maintain sales focus.

Contributed across all Primesight partner agreements, profit share or otherwise, and compiling information as to how these partnerships affect the final EBITDA.
.

experiences.title: National Buying Manager
experiences.description: Responsibility for buying National OOH campaigns in response to briefs issued by client service teams working across the Omnicom, Havas & Walker Media group.

experiences.title: National Buying Manager
experiences.description: Managing a team of two people across non-billboard formats in the OOH industry, with an average billings in excess of £100m pa across these sectors. Would also be responsible for providing weekly updates to all client service & planning teams on market conditions, new trends & fresh opportunities & products in the OOH marketplace.

experiences.title: Regional Buying Manager
experiences.description: Responsibility for buying & distribution of all regional OOH 6s, 48s & 96s campaigns from Blade H/O. The role would also include constsnt liasion with Regional Buying Managers, & with billings in excess of £20m

recommendations:
Lisa Humphreys

Ive had the pleasure of knowing Matt for the last 7 years, both during his time as Investment Director at PrimeSight and most recently in his role at Aviator. Matt was an extremely professional, well respected and tenacious member of the Primesight team. A canny negotiator with an eye for creative ways of brokering deals, I have always found Matt willing to work collaboratively to deliver the best results for my clients whilst delivering his own business objectives. This is often a difficult balancing act and one that Matt managed extremely successfully. I have thoroughly enjoyed working alongside Matt in his roles on both the sell and buy side of the industry and would recommendation him without hesitation.

Naren Patel

I have had the pleasure of working with Matt for over 10 years. Matt was Head of Trading for Primesight for most of his career at Primesight and was responsible for managing the team that were transacting the hundreds of weekly bookings at Primesight. Matt had to try and sell the highest number of billboards at the highest prices every two weeks and this was often a challenge. He was enthusiastic, energetic and had the ability to keep cool during tough negotiations and when demand was low. He has great knowledge and experience when it comes to the Outdoor Industry and he would be an asset to any business

Lisa Humphreys

I’ve had the pleasure of knowing Matt for the last 7 years, both during his time as Investment Director at PrimeSight and most recently in his role at Aviator.
